rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Mickey Wong Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 22, 2016, line 1. Plaintiff Mickey Wong's And Motion To Compel GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to Request #1 to the extent of communicative documents pertaining to properties identified in the Fourth Amended Complaint directly between defendants Doris Wong and Bo Kin Wong excluding joint defense, attorney-client and attorney work product communications which shall be identified in an item-by-item privilege log. Motion is denied as to requests 2-48 on grounds of financial privacy, lack of relevance to the subject matter involved in the pending action and excessive burden. Requests for sanctions are denied. Plaintiff's Supplemental Declaration dated January 20, 2016 is stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLIN HILL VS. HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Olin Hills Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 22, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANTS JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Olin Hills Second Amended Complaint DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts giving rise to the request for punitive damages. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLIN HILL VS. HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 22, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANTS JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and sustained without leave to amend in part. 1.Demurer based on Statute of Limitations is OVERRULED. Defendant's demurrer addresses only some allegations of the complaint re: Statute of Limiations and does not address all the allegations giving rise to Plaintiff's causes of action. See paragraph 27 of Second Amended Complaint. 2.Demurrer to UCL cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. 3.Demurer is otherwise overruled - Negligence per se, elder abuse, age discrimination and Intentional Infliction of Emotional distress are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)
